name: Crown Reserve Acquisition Corp. I
business: Crown Reserve Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operating history and has not generated any revenues. It consummated its initial public offering of 17,250,000 units at $10.00 per unit, generating gross proceeds of $172,500,000, which are held in a trust account.
